description_long: This bonsai features a slender, upright trunk with a rich brown color and a natural, slightly rough texture. The trunk branches out into several medium-thick limbs, each supporting a dense canopy of green, oval-shaped leaves. The foliage is lush and layered, with leaves varying in shades of green, creating a vibrant and healthy appearance. The branches are arranged in a somewhat radial pattern, giving the tree a balanced yet organic silhouette. The overall form suggests an informal upright style, with gentle curves and natural movement in the trunk and branches. The pot is not visible in the images, focusing attention on the tree's structure and foliage.
description: A lush, green-leaved bonsai with a gently curved brown trunk and dense, layered foliage. The branches radiate outward, creating a balanced, natural silhouette.
description_view_0: Front view shows the upright trunk and dense, layered foliage with branches radiating outward.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the branching structure and the spread of leaves, revealing more of the tree's depth.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the back branches and the fullness of the leaf canopy, with some branches partially obscured by foliage.
description_view_3: This side angle emphasizes the trunk's gentle curvature and the outward reach of the branches.
attribute_pot_type: The pot is not visible in the provided images.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is gently curved, following an informal upright style with natural bends and subtle movement.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are arranged in a radial, somewhat layered pattern, creating a balanced and organic silhouette with moderate density.
attribute_leaf_density: The foliage is dense and lush, with leaves covering most branches and creating a full canopy.
